mapper.select: SELECT * FROM review ORDER BY r_no DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review ( r_no, r_title, r_writer, r_date, r_view, r_star, r_detail, r_upload, m_no ) VALUES ( review_seq.nextval, #{r_title}, #{r_writer}, SYSDATE, 0, #{r_star}, #{r_detail}, #{r_upload}, #{m_no} )
mapper.update: UPDATE review SET r_title = #{r_title}, r_date = SYSDATE, r_star = #{r_star}, r_detail = #{r_detail}, r_upload = #{r_upload} WHERE r_no = #{r_no}
